core_objective.text: BUILD ATTENTION-BASED EQUITY SIGNAL RESEARCH PIPELINE: ingest OHLCV bars (CSV/DB fallback like vault_equity), engineer multi-horizon returns and technical features with strict 1-bar shift anti-leakage, train a lightweight self-attention encoder (CPU-safe, no GPU required) to predict next-bar direction, walk-forward purged validation, backtest with transaction costs, emit verified PNL JSON+MD and leakage audit report. Research only.

master_plan.title: Config + data loader + sample CSV
master_plan.intent: Create config.py with HERMES_RESEARCH_SMOKE (LIMIT_BARS=800, EPOCHS=3, LOOKBACK=32). data_loader.py load_bars(symbol, interval) with PostgreSQL then sample_data/aapl_5min_sample.csv fallback. tests/test_loader.py.

master_plan.title: Feature frame + leakage guards
master_plan.intent: features.py: RSI, MACD, return lags, vol — all shifted 1 bar. build_feature_frame(df), assert_no_leakage(), FEATURE_COLS. tests/test_leakage.py with future-injection trap.

master_plan.title: Sequence dataset + purged splits
master_plan.intent: dataset.py build_sequences(lookback). purged_splits.py expanding-window with embargo. FoldScaler fit on train only.

master_plan.title: Attention encoder model
master_plan.intent: attention_model.py: single-head scaled dot-product attention over lookback window, MLP head, train_fold() CPU-safe with AdamW, grad clip. tests/test_attention_model.py one-epoch smoke.

master_plan.title: Walk-forward backtest + costs
master_plan.intent: backtest_pnl.py: OOS-only positions from model scores, slippage+spread costs, NAV curve, Sharpe, max DD. reports/pnl_report.json + md.

master_plan.title: Run pipeline CLI + integration tests
master_plan.intent: run_pipeline.py CLI. tests/test_pipeline_integration.py: end-to-end smoke under 90s.
